title: Achilles perf summary (perf-summary/v1)
description: Contract for <project>/.achilles/perf-summary.json as emitted by hooks/perf-summary-writer.sh (Stop hook) — the authoritative self-report for the perf-onboarding pipeline. The slo_results block is null-statused when no k6 results file exists; verdict and metrics are never fabricated.

generatedAt.description: UTC timestamp of when perf-summary-writer.sh ran.

gitSha.description: HEAD sha of the project repo; empty string outside a git checkout.

runMode.description: runMode from the perf-onboarding ledger; empty string when not parseable.

phases.description: Verbatim .phases array from tests/perf/docs/perf-onboarding-status.json; empty when the ledger is absent.

slo_results.description: Per-scenario SLO result parsed from tests/perf/results/*.json (k6 handleSummary JSON). Metrics and verdict are null when no result file was found — never a fabricated pass.

verdict.description: null when no result file was found — never a fake pass.

breaches.description: SLO threshold breaches; empty when none parseable.

baseline_comparison.description: Per-scenario comparison against tests/perf/baselines/*.json; fields are null when either baseline or results are absent.
